# Paul Kuo — paulkuo.tw

> Paul Kuo (郭曜郎) is an independent developer, BD consultant, and "super individual" (超級個體) based in Taiwan. He operates at the intersection of circular economy, AI-powered tools, and Taiwan-Japan business collaboration. His personal site paulkuo.tw publishes long-form articles in Traditional Chinese, English, Japanese, and Simplified Chinese across five content pillars: Intelligence & Order, Circular Economy, Civilization & Humanity, Creation & Practice, and Reflections & Memory.

Paul leverages AI collaboration as a core working method — accomplishing team-scale output as a solo practitioner. He serves as an external BD consultant at SDTI (佳龍科技), focusing on waste information product recovery and CLGM green materials development for the circular economy. He also builds and operates Agora Plaza (阿哥拉廣場), a real-time meeting transcription and translation tool, and is developing CircleFlow, an AI-driven circular economy data platform.

His brand anchor is "秩序測試" (Order Test) — exploring how to rebuild sustainable order at the intersection of technology and civilization. Key expertise areas include: ESG data infrastructure, cross-border business (Taiwan-Japan), real-time speech recognition, translation quality evaluation (TQEF framework), and AI-augmented content production.

Tech stack: Astro (SSG) + Cloudflare Pages/Workers/D1/KV/R2, Qwen3-ASR (Chinese STT), Groq Whisper (English STT), Deepgram Nova-3 (multilingual STT), Claude API (translation + evaluation), Google Chirp 3 (business Japanese STT). All content is static HTML — no JavaScript required for content extraction.

## About

- [About Paul](https://paulkuo.tw/en/about): Background, philosophy, and professional journey — theology, agricultural e-commerce, circular economy, and AI practice
- [Projects](https://paulkuo.tw/en/projects): Overview of active projects — Agora Plaza, CircleFlow, and multi-model cognitive collaboration

## Articles (Content Pillars)

- [All Articles](https://paulkuo.tw/en/blog): Full article index across five pillars, sorted by date
- [Knowledge Graph](https://paulkuo.tw/en/tags-graph): Visual tag-based knowledge map connecting all articles

### Intelligence & Order (AI 與秩序)

- [The AI Capability Gap: What a Viral Chart Reveals](https://paulkuo.tw/en/articles/ai-capability-gap-2026): Analysis of global AI adoption data — 84% have never used AI, Taiwan's position, and implications
- [I Built a Chrome Extension to Track Claude Usage](https://paulkuo.tw/en/articles/claude-usage-nyan-chrome-extension): Development story of Claude Usage Nyan — official API + real-time token interception
- [6.4%: Pushing Japanese Speech Recognition Accuracy](https://paulkuo.tw/en/articles/google-chirp3-japanese-stt-benchmark): Real-world benchmark of Google Chirp 3 vs Groq Whisper across Japanese business scenarios
- [Code is Cheap: From Vibe Coding to CLAWS](https://paulkuo.tw/en/articles/code-is-cheap-vibe-coding-to-claws): Framework for AI-augmented development beyond "vibe coding"
- [Super Individual Case Study](https://paulkuo.tw/en/articles/super-individual-case-study): How one person with AI achieves team-scale output — a lived case study

### Recycle & Reuse (循環經濟)

- [Circular Economy articles](https://paulkuo.tw/en/blog): Articles on waste recovery, green materials, and ESG infrastructure (filtered by pillar tag)

### Civilization & Human Nature (文明與人性)

- [2030 World Outlook](https://paulkuo.tw/en/articles/world-outlook-2030): Finding position between technological acceleration and physical limits
- [Burnout Society & Self-Exploitation](https://paulkuo.tw/en/articles/burnout-society-self-exploitation): Memorandum for a resilient society — modern exhaustion analysis

### Creation & Enterprise (創造與實踐)

- [Builder's Scorecard Story](https://paulkuo.tw/en/articles/builders-scorecard-story): Design origins and development journey of an OSS investment self-assessment tool

### Reflections & Memory (反思與記憶)

- [Quiet Edge: Thirteen Notes](https://paulkuo.tw/en/articles/quiet-edge-thirteen-notes): Observations on self-possession, reading people, and walking through life
- [Life Database Engineering](https://paulkuo.tw/en/articles/life-database-engineering): When 70,267 memory nodes get structured

## Tools & Projects

- [Agora Plaza — Real-Time Meeting Translator](https://paulkuo.tw/tools/translator/): Tri-engine STT (Qwen3-ASR + Groq Whisper + Deepgram Nova-3) with Claude Haiku translation, 12-language auto-detection
- [Builder's Scorecard](https://paulkuo.tw/tools/builders-scorecard/): Open-source project self-assessment tool adapted from VC investment frameworks
- [TQEF Evaluation](https://paulkuo.tw/tools/tqef/): Translation Quality Evaluation Framework — systematic translation accuracy measurement

## Structured Data

All pages include JSON-LD structured data:
- Home: Person + WebSite schema graph
- Articles: BlogPosting with author reference, datePublished, dateModified, articleSection, inLanguage
- Article listing: CollectionPage schema
- Selected articles: FAQPage schema
- Breadcrumb navigation on all article pages

## AI & Agent Interfaces

- [Agent Card](https://paulkuo.tw/.well-known/agent-card.json): A2A protocol agent card for agent-to-agent discovery
- [MCP Configuration](https://paulkuo.tw/mcp.json): Model Context Protocol tool definitions
- [RSS Feed](https://paulkuo.tw/rss.xml): Full-content RSS for syndication
- [Sitemap](https://paulkuo.tw/sitemap-index.xml): Complete sitemap with lastmod and priority

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://paulkuo.tw/llms-full.txt): Complete markdown content of all articles — AI models can ingest the full knowledge base in one request
- [Search](https://paulkuo.tw/search): Client-side full-text search across all articles
